Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time until Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in high-frequency variants (e.g., top 3 most frequent)
